stemHtml: What is the Doppler effect with reference to radio signals?

options.a: It is fluctuations in their propagation speed.
options.b: It is the increases or decreases in the ground speed of the transmitting aircraft.
options.c: It is interference between the direct and the earth reflected wave.
options.d: It is the shift in frequency of the radio wave due to the relative movement between transmitter and receiver.
